meaning: v.(使)轻摇,(使)微动n.轻摇,微动
examples: Electrons can jiggle and wiggle in a more energetic manner.
Carry the cup carefully and don't jiggle it, or you'll spill the tea.
Carry the cup carefully and don't jiggle it, or you'll spill the coffee.
Waking it back up requires the push of any button or the jiggle of the joystick.
And so the body starts expressing that feeling: jiggle, jiggle, jiggle.
